mission.title: k8up: Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups
mission.description: Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups. Requested by 20+ users.

steps.title: Check current k8up deployment
steps.description:
Verify your k8up version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up
helm list -n k8up 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working k8up installation.

steps.title: Review k8up configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant k8up configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up
kubectl get configmap -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=k8up
```
**As** user of K8up
**I want** to backup PVCs with RWO access mode
**So that** my precious files stored in RWO volumes are backed up as well.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups
steps.description:
```
Given a PVC with RWO access mode in Bound phase
And no application Pod has mounted that PVC
And the linked PV has a NodeAffinity rule defined
When a backup runs
Then the backup Pod runs on the same node as configured via NodeAffinity spec.
And the files are backed up.
```

if the specified node
```yaml
2. Cluster admin labels a PVC `k8up.io/backup-volume: "enabled"`:
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n k8up -l app.kubernetes.io/name=k8up
kubectl get events -n k8up --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Integrated Support for RWO PVCs File Backups" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
```
Given a PVC with RWO access mode in Bound phase
And no application Pod has mounted that PVC
And the linked PV has a NodeAffinity rule defined
When a backup runs
Then the backup Pod runs on the same node as configured via NodeAffinity spec.
And the files are backed up.
```

if the specified node has taints defined we'd need to fetch the node in order to retrieve the necessary tolerations.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with k8up installed or the issue environment reproducible.
